title: Intense Greek Eggplant Moussaka
description: Winey, snappy, festive Greek-style moussaka featuring grilled eggplant, tomato sauce, toasted naan, and a plant-based béchamel, ideal for a celebratory dinner.

ingredients.name: Béchamel base
ingredients.amount: 1 cup plant-based milk, 1 tbsp vegan butter, 1 tbsp flour, 1 tbsp nutritional yeast

instructions: Brush the eggplant slices with olive oil, place them on a baking sheet, and roast for 20 minutes, turning once, until golden.
While the eggplant roasts, heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat and sauté the onion and garlic until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, red wine, oregano, and basil to the saucepan, then simmer the mixture for 15 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in the namul seasoning, season with salt and pepper, and remove the sauce from the heat.

To make the béchamel, melt the vegan butter in a pan over medium heat, whisk in the flour and cook for 2 minutes, then gradually whisk in the plant-based milk until thick, and finally stir in the nutritional yeast until smooth.
Assemble the moussaka by layering roasted eggplant, tomato sauce, and toasted naan slices in a greased baking dish, sprinkling shredded vegan mozzarella between layers.
Pour the béchamel sauce over the layers, ensuring even coverage, and top with any remaining mozzarella.
Bake the assembled moussaka uncovered for 25 minutes until the top is golden and bubbling, then let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
